  "findings": [
    "Rocks are in direct contact with the pipe due to a lack of bedding sand.",
    "Violation of IPC Section 306 trenching, bedding, and backfilling requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop backfilling operations immediately.",
    "Carefully excavate and expose the affected pipe sections to avoid damage.",
    "Remove all rocks and unsuitable backfill material from the trench.",
    "Install proper bedding sand or approved fine granular material under and around the pipe per specifications before backfilling."
  ],
  "rationale": "The presence of rocks directly against the pipe without a protective sand bedding layer violates IPC 306 and standard project specifications. This creates point loads that can puncture, crack, or deform the pipe under backfill compaction and traffic loads, leading to structural failure.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 306.2",
    "Project Specifications Section 312333 (Trenching and Backfilling)"
  ]
}
